name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing a word?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thank you for trusting us with your smile today — we know the dentist isn't everyone's favorite stop, and it genuinely means a lot that you came in.

If you have 30 seconds, a quick review would help other folks who are nervous about finding a dental clinic feel a little less scared about booking their first visit:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something didn't feel right during your visit, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear about it directly so we can make it right.

Take care,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick nudge in case you missed our email. If you have 30 seconds, a short review would really help: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. Thank you!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
